verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Open up my eyes, creator of the earth Let us see your kingdom reign forevermore The heavens open up, and shine the light of truth On the mount of Zion may your glory fall

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The work that you have done, all nations will come to see Every pain and tear, Lord you will wipe away In justice and in truth, You reign forevermore May your Spirit cover over all the earth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: On that day every nation will rise Exalt your name, give you praise through all the earth Lift your voice to Jesus the King Hallelujah Let your kingdom forever reign

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus Christ, you are the King of Kings Jesus Christ you are Almighty God The worthy lamb who reigns in victory May your glory shine forevermore.
